extension.name: System – Joomla Helpers Loader
extension.author: salmutter.net
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later; see LICENSE.txt
extension.description:
System plugin that provides the shared helper baseline (namespace: SalmutterNet\JoomlaHelpers) and optionally loads project-local helpers.
Usage: - Shared helpers are bundled with this plugin and are available after plugin initialisation. - Project-local helpers are loaded from one or more paths (parameter: local_helpers_paths). If empty, defaults to: - templates/{activeTemplate}/local-helpers - local-helpers Each path may contain vendor/autoload.php (Composer) and/or src/ (PSR-4 for Project\*).

field.name: local_helpers_paths
field.label: Local helpers paths
field.description: Optional. One path per line (or comma separated). Relative paths are relative to JPATH_ROOT. Each path may contain vendor/autoload.php and/or src/ for Project\* classes. If empty: templates/{activeTemplate}/local-helpers and then local-helpers.
